10160:    Ok(locus::LocusRegisterMtsParams {
10161:        wp_id: wp_id.to_string(),
10162:        micro_tasks,
10163:    })
10164:}
10165:
10166:fn normalize_locus_register_mts_params(
10167:    mut params: locus::LocusRegisterMtsParams,
10168:) -> Result<locus::LocusRegisterMtsParams, WorkflowError> {
10169:    let runtime_paths = RuntimeGovernancePaths::resolve().map_err(|e| {
10170:        WorkflowError::Terminal(format!(
10171:            "failed to resolve runtime governance paths for structured collaboration registry: {e}"
10172:        ))
10173:    })?;
10174:    let wp_id = params.wp_id.clone();
10175:    for tracked_mt in params.micro_tasks.iter_mut() {
10176:        apply_runtime_structured_micro_task_registry(&runtime_paths, &wp_id, tracked_mt)?;
10177:    }
10178:    Ok(params)
10179:}

10203:        tracked_mt,

10205:        summary_display.clone(),
10206:        vec![packet_display.clone()],
10207:        Vec::new(),
10208:    );
10209:    if !tracked_mt.metadata.is_object() {
10210:        tracked_mt.metadata = json!({});
10211:    }
10212:    tracked_mt.metadata["structured_collaboration_summary_path"] =
10213:        Value::String(summary_display.clone());
10214:    if tracked_mt
10215:        .metadata
10216:        .get("structured_collaboration_summary")

10233:    }
